1903000.name: RPG Maker MZ - SFBeats Music Pack
1903000.description:
This is a collection of music that are best suited for science fiction and dark fantasy themed stories!
The pack features a collection of music suitable as title music, field music, or battle music, make good use of them the way you see fit and add another layer of depth to your game!

*******************************************
▽Contents
Audio：12（ogg、m4a）
*******************************************

・This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series ONLY
・OK to be used in Commercial projects made in RPG Maker
・You may modify some of the assets (but not redistribute them) for your own game use only.
・All copyrights, neighboring rights, and all other rights to this material belong to the creator or a third party authorized by the creator.
